description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named rcc that runs on pushes to main, master, and r-* branches, on pull requests to these branches, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run R CMD check on multiple operating systems (macOS, Windows, Ubuntu) and R versions, including release, devel, and oldrel versions. It sets up R and dependencies, installs packages, and runs checks with various configurations, including MySQL and MariaDB databases.
